app.title: BERT Candidate Registration Portal
app.description: Frontend-only candidate registration portal for modernization assessment.

feedback.unexpectedErrorBody: The page hit an unexpected error. Reload the page or return to the dashboard and try again.

feedback.candidatesLoadError: The candidate list could not be loaded. Refresh the page or try again in a moment.
feedback.registrationSubmitError: Registration could not be submitted. Review your entries and try again.
feedback.networkTimeout: The request took too long. Check your connection and try submitting again.
feedback.unexpectedError: Something unexpected happened. Please try again, or refresh the page if the issue continues.

api.invalidJson: The request body must be valid JSON.
api.invalidExamWindow: Select a valid preferred exam window.

validation.invalidPhone: Enter a valid international phone number (e.g. +48123123123).
validation.experienceMax: Experience must be 50 years or less.
validation.graduationYearRange: Graduation year must be between {minYear} and {maxYear}.
validation.universityRequired: University name is required when a degree is selected.
validation.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions.

dashboard.title: Candidate Dashboard
dashboard.description: Review registrations and filter by name, program, or status.
dashboard.emptyState: No candidates match the current filters.
dashboard.loadError: The candidate list could not be loaded. Refresh the page or try again in a moment.

registration.pageDescription: Register a new candidate through the guided three-step form.
registration.stepErrorSummary: Review the highlighted fields before continuing.
registration.successBody: {candidateName} was registered successfully. The candidate will appear on the dashboard.
registration.termsLabel: I accept the terms and conditions for candidate registration and exam scheduling.

steps.title: Personal Information
steps.description: Identify the candidate and confirm primary contact details.

steps.title: Education & Experience
steps.description: Capture academic background and professional experience.

steps.title: Program Selection & Review
steps.description: Choose a program level, review your entries, and submit.

level2.title: Level II eligibility
level2.message: A prior Level I pass within the last 5 years is required. Additional verification is required because this form does not collect prior exam history.

level3.title: Level III eligibility
level3.message: A prior Level II pass within the last 5 years is required. Additional verification is required because this form does not collect prior exam history.

level1Eligible.title: Likely eligible for Level I
level1Eligible.message: Based on the education and experience entered, this candidate appears eligible for Level I. Final eligibility is confirmed after review.

level1NotEligible.title: Not likely eligible for Level I
level1NotEligible.message: Level I typically requires a Bachelor, Master, or PhD degree, or at least 4 years of professional experience.
